title: Job History Logging Interface
description: The `HistoryEvent.java` file in Hadoop's jobhistory directory defines an interface for event wrapper classes. It serves as a contract for Avro-generated event classes, providing methods to interact with events, convert them to TimelineEvents, and retrieve associated metrics. This interface doesn't have explicit inputs or outputs but implies handling of Avro-generated event data and production of TimelineEvent objects. It depends on YARN timeline service records and standard Java classes, utilizing Java's generics and Hadoop classification annotations.

TITLE: Job History Logging Interface

DESCRIPTION: The `HistoryEvent.java` file in Hadoop's jobhistory directory defines an interface for event wrapper classes. It serves as a contract for Avro-generated event classes, providing methods to interact with events, convert them to TimelineEvents, and retrieve associated metrics. This interface doesn't have explicit inputs or outputs but implies handling of Avro-generated event data and production of TimelineEvent objects. It depends on YARN timeline service records and standard Java classes, utilizing Java's generics and Hadoop classification annotations.
